mapper.select: SELECT o.*, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT u.real_name FROM students s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT real_name FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_name, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT student_no FROM students WHERE id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_no FROM space_occupant o WHERE o.space_id = #{spaceId} AND o.status = 1 ORDER BY o.position_no

SELECT o.*, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT u.real_name FROM students s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT real_name FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_name, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT student_no FROM students WHERE id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_no FROM space_occupant o WHERE o.space_id = #{spaceId} ORDER BY o.status DESC, o.check_in_date DESC
SELECT o.*, s.space_name FROM space_occupant o LEFT JOIN space s ON o.space_id = s.id WHERE o.occupant_type = #{occupantType} AND o.occupant_id = #{occupantId} AND o.status = 1

SELECT o.*, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT u.real_name FROM students s JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT real_name FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_name, CASE WHEN o.occupant_type = 'STUDENT' THEN (SELECT student_no FROM students WHERE id = o.occupant_id) ELSE (SELECT username FROM users WHERE id = o.occupant_id) END AS occupant_no FROM space_occupant o WHERE o.space_id = #{spaceId} AND o.position_no = #{positionNo} AND o.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM space_occupant WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status = 1
SELECT position_no FROM space_occupant WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status = 1 AND position_no IS NOT NULL ORDER BY position_no
mapper.update: UPDATE space_occupant SET status = 0, check_out_date = CURRENT_DATE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status = 1
